message:
perf(wasm): Zero-copy columnar access for hash join and GROUP BY

Replace row-by-row getIntValue calls with direct columnar access:
- hashTableBuild: Get col.data.int64 slice directly (zero-copy)
- hashTableBuildFromSlice: Process column with SIMD hash
- groupHashBuild: Same zero-copy pattern
- groupHashBuildFromSlice: SIMD hash + sequential group assignment

For non-int64 columns or lazy columns, batch-read entire column
into temp buffer first, then process (still faster than per-row).

This ensures JOIN and GROUP BY operate on contiguous memory
without per-row function call overhead.

Results at 100K rows:
- JOIN: 5.70ms (1.82x slower than DuckDB, down from 11x initially)
